model.label: MiMo-V2-Flash
model.description: MiMo • Flash-tier model configured through a custom endpoint for fast inference and lightweight agent tasks.

pick.rationale: Arizona enters as a dominant 1-seed with elite efficiency metrics, ranking 3rd in both KenPom and Torvik, while LIU, a 234th-ranked NEC champion, lacks the offensive firepower to compete. The Wildcats' top-10 adjusted offense and defense should overwhelm LIU's average attack, and there are no significant injury concerns for Arizona. Although LIU has momentum from its conference title, the talent gap is too wide for a credible upset path.

reasoningStep.title: Team Quality and Efficiency Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Arizona's advanced metrics show a massive advantage over LIU, with the Wildcats ranking 3rd nationally in both KenPom and Torvik, while LIU sits outside the top 200.
reasoningStep.evidence: Arizona: KenPom rank 3, Torvik rank 3, adjoe 127.2, adjde 89.7. LIU: KenPom rank 216, Torvik rank 234, adjoe 105.7, adjde 109.6.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

result.title: LIU wins NEC championship, returns to March Madness for first time ...
result.snippet: Anticlimactics be damned, the Sharks of Long Island University put on a show in one of the strangest conference championships , having already clinched an automatic spot in March Madness before ...

result.title: LIU Sharks earn March Madness matchup with No. 1 seed Arizona
result.snippet: The LIU Sharks men's basketball team captured the NEC championship and earned an automatic bid to the NCAA Tournament , where they will face top-seeded Arizona in the first round in San Diego. Led by head coach Rod Strickland, the Sharks are making their first March Madness appearance since 2018 after going from just 3 wins in Strickland's first season to 24 victories this year.

result.title: LIU Sharks become first team into 2026 NCAA Tournament after unusual ...
result.snippet: The Sharks will still play the Mercyhurst Lakers in the NEC championship game Monday, but their spot in March Madness is already guaranteed.

result.title: Shark Scoop - March 8, 2026
result.snippet: The LIU men's basketball team has a lot to celebrate after winning against Mercyhurst 79-70 on Tuesday night, March 10. This win contributed to their 7th NEC Championship since the start of the basketball program, and marked their return to March Madness since 2018.

result.title: The Sharks are Dancing! LIU Men's Hoops to Take on Arizona to Open NCAA ...
result.snippet: LIU's 24 wins are the most in the Sharks era of the program, and the first 20-plus win season since the 2016-17 campaign. The Sharks won their seventh NEC Men's Basketball Tournament championship in program history on Tuesday, defeating No. 3 seed Mercyhurst 79-70 in Brooklyn.

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.

Tournament year: 2026
Current game id: r64-west-1
Current game label: West 1/16
Round: Round of 64
Resolved teams: Arizona (arizona) vs LIU (liu)
Prior committed picks: 12
